text.title: QA Test Strategy Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Strategy lists pytest/jest/k6/playwright as 'the strategy'; no risks named.
antipattern.fix: Rewrite: open with numbered risks; map each to layer/tool.

antipattern.symptom: Owner of integration layer is 'QA team'; nobody signs off in practice.
antipattern.fix: Assign single handle; record sign-off in the release ticket.

antipattern.symptom: Strategy is 14 pages; reviewers skim page 1 only.
antipattern.fix: Cut to one page; move details to appendices.
